reviews.review_description: it is such a good experience but incredibly short. 5/5 would recommend.
No point.  Environment is wicked cool. Big let down though no real gameplay

It's an escape room that's not really an escape room.  One puzzle.  No running.  No scares.  No checkpoints.  Lots of dead ends.  No points or collectables.  No timer.  No hiding places.  You're just going from point A to point B.

It tries with some creepy music near the beginning, but the rest of the game is weak sauce.  If you make a wrong turn, you're already cut off and waiting two seconds for the bad guy to kill you so you can start over.

After facing four potential paths in the beginning, three of which are dead ends, the rest is easy to navigate.

It’s a very basic horror experience like many others I’ve played over the years on Oculus Go and Quest.

It’s over in a few minutes and not much happens, but if you’re new to VR horror it might be good for a scare or two and worth a download. 

It’s average quality for this type of free or low cost experience, so I’ll give it an average 3 stars.

reviews.review_title: Just a scary runner, but a nice one

reviews.review_description: This game is really good but really short if they made it longer it would have been a lot better
